javax.xml.transform.stax/StAXSource/FEAT.name: FEATURE
javax.xml.transform.stax/StAXSource/FEAT.description:
IfTransformerFactory.getFeature(String name)returns true when passed this value as an argument,
 the Transformer supports Source input of this type.
